title: Modernized Retro
description:
A re-imagining of minecraft if unused, old & scrapped features were never tossed aside!

Features a lot of different mods to make your experience as best as possible.

This modpack is meant to make the modern-era updates feel like mods in old minecraft.
body:
A modpack to make your experience playing modern minecraft feel like you're a kid again.

Featuring various QOL changes, and things to fit the vanilla gameplay. Additionally, gigantic changes to make everything feel like you're back in beta minecraft.

From content, to small changes, to re-introducing bugs and old mechanics. You've got it all!
Let's not forget that a lot of mods here add unused or scrapped features, including parity via Bedrock & MC: Earth.

This modpack is meant to make the modern-era updates feel like mods in old minecraft.

Features include:
- April fools items!
- Super Secret Settings return
- Resource packs to bring in that feel, including one specifically custom made for this modpack with over 60+ textures!
- Old, removed, mentioned & unused features in new light or in their intended purpose
- A few mods that fit the vanilla scene, to spice up the gameplay!
- A bunch of parity related things with Bedrock, Dungeons & Earth!
  - Some things include: Mobs, Wither Rework, Cauldron Potions, etc.
- And more!


![The Mauler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a04947413c2f8273be9680f1439ad673dcb993d.png)
